control_observations: The record was retained with the July onboarding control set because it shares at least one source-system field family with identity, tax, banking, address, work authorization, or employment setup.
Operators reviewing the queue normally compare worker id, source timestamp, status, field ids, and owner queue before deciding whether the row belongs with a person-specific packet.

The export preserves original source wording in addition to normalized queue metadata, which means bank products, address strings, filing-status labels, and eligibility labels can appear beside system-specific codes.

A nightly reconciliation job stores this row even when the corresponding person-specific workflow is handled elsewhere, so the artifact can be near a packet without serving as the final employee evidence.
Control total note: batch PLC-PEOPLERE-053 balanced against the source-system row count and was released to the evidence archive with unchanged free-text notes.
Reviewer note: no profile fields were edited from this artifact during the export window; the line remains available for audit review and support triage.
